title: ononis natrix var. glabriuscula
intro: Ononis natrix var. glabriuscula, also known as the smooth jointed bedstraw or smooth bedstraw, is a plant species of the Ononis genus, which is part of the legume family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The smooth jointed bedstraw is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
